findings.message: WSF_AIR_TO_AIR_MISSILE cannot be used directly as a standalone weapon block type; use a self-contained explicit weapon profile or omit the weapon block

repair_steps.issue: WSF_AIR_TO_AIR_MISSILE cannot be used directly as a standalone weapon block type; use a self-contained explicit weapon profile or omit the weapon block
repair_steps.repair_hint: Render components from type-specific templates and move parameters into legal sub-blocks.

findings.message: WSF_AIR_TO_AIR_MISSILE cannot be used directly as a standalone weapon block type; use a self-contained explicit weapon profile or omit the weapon block

repair_plan.repaired_text_preview:
script_interface
   debug
end_script_interface

antenna_pattern SEARCH_RADAR_ANTENNA
   constant_pattern
      peak_gain 30 dB
      azimuth_beamwidth 20 deg
      elevation_beamwidth 20 deg
   end_constant_pattern
end_antenna_pattern

weapon aam_basic WSF_AIR_TO_AIR_MISSILE
end_weapon

platform_type FIGHTER_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_AIR_MOVER
      maximum_speed 300 m/sec
      minimum_speed 60 m/sec
   end_mover
   sensor fighter_radar WSF_RADAR_SENSOR
      frame_time 2 sec
      minimum_range 0 nm
      maximum_range 80 nm
      reports_location
      reports_range
      reports_bearing
      transmitter
         antenna_pattern SEARCH_RADAR_ANTENNA
         power 150 kw
         pulse_width 2.0e-6 sec
         pulse_repetition_frequency 400 hz
         frequency 1285 mhz
      end_transmitter
      receiver
         antenna_pattern SEARCH_RADAR_ANTENNA
         bandwidth 1 mhz
      end_receiver
   end_sensor
   processor launch_comp WSF_AIR_TO_AIR_LAUNCH_COMPUTER
   end_processor
   processor engage WSF_WEAPONS_MANAGER_AI
   end_processor
end_platform_type

platform blue_fighter FIGHTER_TYPE
   side blue
   heading 120 deg
   route
      position 30.67n 104.07e altitude 3000 m msl speed 180 m/sec
      position 30.80n 104.25e altitude 3000 m msl speed 180 m/sec
   end_route
   sensor fighter_radar
      on
   end_sensor
   add_weapon aam_basic 6
end_platform

platform red_fighter FIGHTER_TYPE
   side red
   heading 300 deg
   route
      position 30.92n 104.37e altitude 3000 m msl speed 180 m/sec
      position 30.75n 104.15e altitude 3000 m msl speed 180 m/sec
   end_route
   sensor fighter_radar
      on
   end_sensor
   add_weapon aam_basic 6
end_platform

event_pipe
   file output/air_to_air_1v1.aer
end_event_pipe

end_time 300 sec
